# Rigid Body Physics 3d

> 3D rigid body simulation with gravity and collision

**Category:** Integration · **Version:** 1.0.0 · **Tags:** integration · godot

## What this does

3D rigid body simulation with gravity and collision

Specifies 7 acceptance outcomes that any implementation must satisfy, regardless of language or framework.

## What must be true

- **implementation:** Feature implemented in C++ engine core
- **platform_agnostic:** Works across desktop, web, mobile platforms

## Success & failure scenarios

**✅ Success paths**

- **Rigid Body Creation** — when Dynamic bodies with mass and inertia is requested, then Dynamic bodies with mass and inertia completed.
- **Linear Velocity** — when Set and read velocity is requested, then Set and read velocity completed.
- **Angular Velocity** — when Set and read rotational velocity is requested, then Set and read rotational velocity completed.
- **Force Application** — when Apply forces at center or offset is requested, then Apply forces at center or offset completed.
- **Impulses** — when Apply instantaneous velocity changes is requested, then Apply instantaneous velocity changes completed.
- **Gravity** — when Enable/disable gravity per body is requested, then Enable/disable gravity per body completed.
- **Damping** — when Linear and angular drag is requested, then Linear and angular drag completed.
